# Track E conflict fixtures

Golden **multi-instrument triangulation** scenarios for E6 TrustReport composer tests.

**Binding:** [`docs/TRACK_E_E4_TRUSTREPORT_CONFLICT_FIXTURES_001.md`](../../docs/TRACK_E_E4_TRUSTREPORT_CONFLICT_FIXTURES_001.md)

Each fixture contains a `triangulation_profile` (E3 shape) and `expected` outcomes. No production code consumes these yet.
